trades.reasoning: RSI 61 in bullish zone with MACD crossover and price above SMA-20, and it diversifies the portfolio into fintech away from the crypto-miner cluster dominating the candidate list.

decisions.briefing: Markets were mildly positive today (NASDAQ +0.8%, S&P +0.4%) but not a strong risk-on signal, so I made one measured medium-conviction buy in NU to use some of the $877 cash on hand rather than forcing a full deployment. Existing positions were held unchanged since neutral days should let profit targets and stop-losses do the work.

market_education.summary_en: Both major indices closed modestly higher today, with the Nasdaq slightly outpacing the S&P 500, consistent with a broadly neutral-to-mildly-positive session rather than a decisive risk-on move. No standout catalyst was evident in the screened data, suggesting the gains reflect general market drift rather than a specific news event. Given the lack of a strong signal, position sizing stayed conservative today.
market_education.summary_zh: 今日兩大指數皆溫和收高，納指升幅略優於標普500，屬於中性偏多的走勢，而非明確的風險偏好轉強訊號。從篩選數據中未見特別突出的催化因素，顯示今日漲幅較可能反映大盤整體的自然波動，而非單一新聞事件所致。由於缺乏強烈訊號，今日的加碼規模維持保守。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Position sizing means deciding how much money to put into a single trade based on your conviction and the market environment, not just whether you have cash available. On a neutral day like today, sizing a new buy smaller than usual balances the risk rule of deploying idle cash against the discipline of not overcommitting without a clear risk-on signal.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 部位規模（Position Sizing）是指根據信心程度與市場環境，決定投入單一交易的資金多寡，而不是單純因為手上有現金就滿倉買入。像今天這種中性市場，將新買入的部位規模控制得比平常小，可以在「善用閒置現金」與「沒有明確風險偏好訊號時不過度加碼」之間取得平衡。
